mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, GRP_NO, ITEM_NO, ITEM_TYPE, ITEM_SUB_TYPE, MNG_NO, XPOINT, YPOINT, ITEM_SIZE, SH_EVT, ITEM_SUB_KIND, ITEM_FILE_NAME, ITEM_ALIAS, USER_CONTENT, FONT_SIZE, EVT_LEVEL, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, USR_KIND, GC_NO, UNIQ_ID, EVT_TYPE, TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, SHOW_LABEL FROM CM_TOPO_ITEM WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT USER_ID, GRP_NO, MNG_NO1, IF_IDX1, URL, LINE_SIZE, LINE_TYPE, SH_EVT, ITEM_NO1, ITEM_NO2, EVT_LEVEL1, POINT1, POINT2, LINE_WIDTH1, LINK_IDX1, LINK_NO, MNG_NO2, IF_IDX2, EVT_LEVEL2, LINE_WIDTH2, LINK_NAME1, LINK_NAME2, IS_MAIN, GC_NO, TRAFFIC1, TRAFFIC2, IS_MULTI, LINK_IDX2, TRAFFIC_TYPE1, TRAFFIC_TYPE2, LINE_POINT_UD1, LINE_POINT_LR1, LINE_POINT_UD2, LINE_POINT_LR2, POINT3, USER_POLL_LINE_COLOR1, USER_POLL_LINE_COLOR2, CURVE_X1, CURVE_Y1, CURVE_X2, CURVE_Y2, LINE_STYLE, LINE_COLOR, POLLING_COLOR, TRAFFIC1_IN, TRAFFIC1_OUT, TRAFFIC2_IN, TRAFFIC2_OUT FROM CM_TOPO_LINK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID, ITEM_NO, MNG_NO, IF_IDX, EVT_LEVEL, LINE_WIDTH, LINK_NO, LINK_NAME, TRAFFIC, TRAFFIC_TYPE, DASH_KEY FROM CM_TOPO_LINK_MULTI WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT USER_ID, LEGEND_TRAFFIC, LEGEND_ERR, LEGEND_DETAIL, TRAFFIC_X, TRAFFIC_Y, ERR_X, ERR_Y, DETAIL_X, DETAIL_Y, SHOW_IP, SHOW_BALLOON, TR_LMT1, TR_LMT2, TR_LMT3, TR_LMT4, TR_RGB1, TR_RGB2, TR_RGB3, TR_RGB4, TR_RGB5, ER_RGB1, ER_RGB2, ER_RGB3, ER_RGB4, ER_RGB5, VW_ROUTER, VW_SWITCH, VW_SERVER, VW_SUB, VW_LINK, VW_ETC, LK_LMT1, LK_LMT2, LK_LMT3, LK_RGB1, LK_RGB2, LK_RGB3, LK_RGB4, SHOW_EVT_LEVEL, REFRESH_TIME, IS_BLANK_EVT, SHOW_LABEL, SHOW_LABEL_RACK, LINE_COLOR, POLLING_COLOR, ALARM_CHK, ALARM_LV1_CHK, ALARM_LV2_CHK, ALARM_LV3_CHK, ALARM_LV4_CHK, ALARM_LV5_CHK, ALARM_LV1_PATH, ALARM_LV2_PATH, ALARM_LV3_PATH, ALARM_LV4_PATH, ALARM_LV5_PATH, FONT_COLOR, FONT_BG_COLOR FROM CM_TOPO_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT DRAW_NO, USER_ID, GRP_NO, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, POS_X, POS_Y, WIDTH, HEIGHT, FILL_COLOR, FILL_OPACITY, STROKE_COLOR, STROKE_OPACITY, STROKE_WIDTH, CORNER_RADIUS, FONT_SIZE, FONT_WEIGHT, TEXT_ANCHOR, TEXT_CONTENT, RX, RY, SORT_IDX FROM CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_GROUP ( USER_ID, GRP_NO, GRP_NAME, GRP_PARENT, BG_FILE_NM, GIS_ZOOM, GIS_LAT, GIS_LNT ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.GRP_NO} AS BIGINT), #{item.GRP_NAME}, CAST(#{item.GRP_PARENT} AS BIGINT), #{item.BG_FILE_NM}, CAST(#{item.GIS_ZOOM} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.GIS_LAT} AS NUMERIC(14,9)), CAST(#{item.GIS_LNT} AS NUMERIC(12,7)))

INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_ITEM ( USER_ID, GRP_NO, ITEM_NO, ITEM_TYPE, ITEM_SUB_TYPE, MNG_NO, XPOINT, YPOINT, ITEM_SIZE, SH_EVT, ITEM_SUB_KIND, ITEM_FILE_NAME, ITEM_ALIAS, USER_CONTENT, FONT_SIZE, EVT_LEVEL, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, USR_KIND, GC_NO, UNIQ_ID, EVT_TYPE, TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, SHOW_LABEL ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.GRP_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.ITEM_NO} AS BIGINT), #{item.ITEM_TYPE}, #{item.ITEM_SUB_TYPE}, CAST(#{item.MNG_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.XPOINT} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.YPOINT} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ITEM_SIZE} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SH_EVT} AS INTEGER), #{item.ITEM_SUB_KIND}, #{item.ITEM_FILE_NAME}, #{item.ITEM_ALIAS}, #{item.USER_CONTENT}, CAST(#{item.FONT_SIZE} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.EVT_LEVEL} AS NUMERIC), #{item.DEV_KIND1}, #{item.DEV_KIND2}, #{item.USR_KIND}, CAST(#{item.GC_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.UNIQ_ID} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.EVT_TYPE} AS NUMERIC), #{item.TEMP1}, #{item.TEMP2}, #{item.TEMP3}, CAST(#{item.SHOW_LABEL} AS NUMERIC))

INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_ETC ( USER_ID, ITEM_NO, DEV_NAME, DEV_IP, ICMP_POLLING, URL ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.ITEM_NO} AS BIGINT), #{item.DEV_NAME}, #{item.DEV_IP}, #{item.ICMP_POLLING}, #{item.URL})

INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_LINK ( USER_ID, GRP_NO, MNG_NO1, IF_IDX1, URL, LINE_SIZE, LINE_TYPE, SH_EVT, ITEM_NO1, ITEM_NO2, EVT_LEVEL1, POINT1, POINT2, LINE_WIDTH1, LINK_IDX1, LINK_NO, MNG_NO2, IF_IDX2, EVT_LEVEL2, LINE_WIDTH2, LINK_NAME1, LINK_NAME2, IS_MAIN, GC_NO, TRAFFIC1, TRAFFIC2, IS_MULTI, LINK_IDX2, TRAFFIC_TYPE1, TRAFFIC_TYPE2, LINE_POINT_UD1, LINE_POINT_LR1, LINE_POINT_UD2, LINE_POINT_LR2, POINT3, USER_POLL_LINE_COLOR1, USER_POLL_LINE_COLOR2, CURVE_X1, CURVE_Y1, CURVE_X2, CURVE_Y2, LINE_STYLE, LINE_COLOR, POLLING_COLOR, TRAFFIC1_IN, TRAFFIC1_OUT, TRAFFIC2_IN, TRAFFIC2_OUT ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.GRP_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.MNG_NO1} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.IF_IDX1} AS BIGINT), #{item.URL}, CAST(#{item.LINE_SIZE} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_TYPE} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SH_EVT} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ITEM_NO1} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.ITEM_NO2} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.EVT_LEVEL1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.POINT1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.POINT2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_WIDTH1} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.LINK_IDX1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINK_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.MNG_NO2} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.IF_IDX2} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.EVT_LEVEL2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_WIDTH2} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), #{item.LINK_NAME1}, #{item.LINK_NAME2}, CAST(#{item.IS_MAIN} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.GC_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC1} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC2} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.IS_MULTI} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINK_IDX2} AS NUMERIC), #{item.TRAFFIC_TYPE1}, #{item.TRAFFIC_TYPE2}, CAST(#{item.LINE_POINT_UD1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_POINT_LR1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_POINT_UD2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_POINT_LR2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.POINT3} AS NUMERIC), #{item.USER_POLL_LINE_COLOR1}, #{item.USER_POLL_LINE_COLOR2}, CAST(#{item.CURVE_X1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.CURVE_Y1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.CURVE_X2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.CURVE_Y2} AS NUMERIC), #{item.LINE_STYLE}, #{item.LINE_COLOR}, #{item.POLLING_COLOR}, CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC1_IN} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC1_OUT} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC2_IN} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC2_OUT} AS NUMERIC(20,0)))

INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_LINK_MULTI ( USER_ID, ITEM_NO, MNG_NO, IF_IDX, EVT_LEVEL, LINE_WIDTH, LINK_NO, LINK_NAME, TRAFFIC, TRAFFIC_TYPE, DASH_KEY ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.ITEM_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.MNG_NO} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.IF_IDX} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{item.EVT_LEVEL} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LINE_WIDTH} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), CAST(#{item.LINK_NO} AS BIGINT), #{item.LINK_NAME}, CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC} AS NUMERIC(20,0)), #{item.TRAFFIC_TYPE}, #{item.DASH_KEY})

INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_USER ( USER_ID, LEGEND_TRAFFIC, LEGEND_ERR, LEGEND_DETAIL, TRAFFIC_X, TRAFFIC_Y, ERR_X, ERR_Y, DETAIL_X, DETAIL_Y, SHOW_IP, SHOW_BALLOON, TR_LMT1, TR_LMT2, TR_LMT3, TR_LMT4, TR_RGB1, TR_RGB2, TR_RGB3, TR_RGB4, TR_RGB5, ER_RGB1, ER_RGB2, ER_RGB3, ER_RGB4, ER_RGB5, VW_ROUTER, VW_SWITCH, VW_SERVER, VW_SUB, VW_LINK, VW_ETC, LK_LMT1, LK_LMT2, LK_LMT3, LK_RGB1, LK_RGB2, LK_RGB3, LK_RGB4, SHOW_EVT_LEVEL, REFRESH_TIME, IS_BLANK_EVT, SHOW_LABEL, SHOW_LABEL_RACK, LINE_COLOR, POLLING_COLOR, ALARM_CHK, ALARM_LV1_CHK, ALARM_LV2_CHK, ALARM_LV3_CHK, ALARM_LV4_CHK, ALARM_LV5_CHK, ALARM_LV1_PATH, ALARM_LV2_PATH, ALARM_LV3_PATH, ALARM_LV4_PATH, ALARM_LV5_PATH, FONT_COLOR, FONT_BG_COLOR ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.LEGEND_TRAFFIC} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LEGEND_ERR} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LEGEND_DETAIL} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC_X} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TRAFFIC_Y} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ERR_X} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ERR_Y} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.DETAIL_X} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.DETAIL_Y} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SHOW_IP} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SHOW_BALLOON} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_LMT1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_LMT2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_LMT3} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_LMT4} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_RGB1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_RGB2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_RGB3} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_RGB4} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.TR_RGB5} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ER_RGB1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ER_RGB2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ER_RGB3} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ER_RGB4} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ER_RGB5} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.VW_ROUTER} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.VW_SWITCH} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.VW_SERVER} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.VW_SUB} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.VW_LINK} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.VW_ETC} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_LMT1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_LMT2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_LMT3} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_RGB1} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_RGB2} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_RGB3} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.LK_RGB4} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SHOW_EVT_LEVEL} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.REFRESH_TIME} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.IS_BLANK_EVT} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SHOW_LABEL} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SHOW_LABEL_RACK} AS NUMERIC), #{item.LINE_COLOR}, #{item.POLLING_COLOR}, CAST(#{item.ALARM_CHK} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ALARM_LV1_CHK} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ALARM_LV2_CHK} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ALARM_LV3_CHK} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ALARM_LV4_CHK} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.ALARM_LV5_CHK} AS NUMERIC), #{item.ALARM_LV1_PATH}, #{item.ALARM_LV2_PATH}, #{item.ALARM_LV3_PATH}, #{item.ALARM_LV4_PATH}, #{item.ALARM_LV5_PATH}, #{item.FONT_COLOR}, #{item.FONT_BG_COLOR})

INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL ( USER_ID, GRP_NO, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, POS_X, POS_Y, WIDTH, HEIGHT, FILL_COLOR, FILL_OPACITY, STROKE_COLOR, STROKE_OPACITY, STROKE_WIDTH, CORNER_RADIUS, FONT_SIZE, FONT_WEIGHT, TEXT_ANCHOR, TEXT_CONTENT, RX, RY, SORT_IDX ) VALUES
(#{userId}, CAST(#{item.GRP_NO} AS BIGINT), #{item.DEV_KIND1}, #{item.DEV_KIND2}, CAST(#{item.POS_X} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.POS_Y} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.WIDTH} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.HEIGHT} AS NUMERIC), #{item.FILL_COLOR}, #{item.FILL_OPACITY}, #{item.STROKE_COLOR}, #{item.STROKE_OPACITY}, CAST(#{item.STROKE_WIDTH} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{item.CORNER_RADIUS} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{item.FONT_SIZE} AS INTEGER), #{item.FONT_WEIGHT}, #{item.TEXT_ANCHOR}, #{item.TEXT_CONTENT}, CAST(#{item.RX} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.RY} AS NUMERIC), CAST(#{item.SORT_IDX} AS INTEGER))
mapper.select: SELECT DUMP_SEQ AS "dumpSeq", TO_CHAR(INS_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "insDate", MEMO AS memo FROM CM_TOPO_DUMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY DUMP_SEQ DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(A.INS_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "insDate", B.DUMP_SEQ AS "dumpSeq", TO_CHAR(B.INS_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "restDate", B.MEMO AS memo, (SELECT USER_NAME FROM COM_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.REST_USER_ID) || '(' || A.REST_USER_ID || ')' AS "restUserNm", A.REST_USER_IP AS "restUserIp" FROM CM_TOPO_RESTORE_HIST A, CM_TOPO_DUMP B WHERE A.INS_DATE BETWEEN CAST(#{datetime1} AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(#{datetime2} AS TIMESTAMP) AND A.DUMP_SEQ = B.DUMP_SEQ ORDER BY A.INS_DATE DESC
